name: Dill Cottage Cheese Batter Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Small curd cottage cheese (warmed slightly)
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a 1-quart baking dish.
2. In a 1-cup glass measure, sprinkle yeast and sugar over very warm water. Stir to dissolve yeast. Let stand until bubbly, about 10 minutes.
3. Beat egg slightly in a large bowl. Add dried instant onions, butter, dillweed, salt, cottage cheese, and baking powder; beat until well blended.
4. Stir in the yeast mixture until well blended. Gradually stir in enough flour to make a soft dough.
5. Place dough in prepared baking dish. Cover with buttered wax paper and a towel. Let rise in a warm place away from drafts until doubled in bulk, about 1 hour.
6. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Bake for 60 minutes or until loaf sounds hollow when tapped on the top with fingers.
7. Turn bread out onto a wire rack. Brush with melted butter and sprinkle with salt. Serve warm. Makes 1 loaf (12 slices).
- Per slice: 134 calories, 3 grams fat.
